rationale: Both resulting PRs are equivalent: Review 1's four naming/docstring suggestions (map_proj, smul_eq_apply, applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul, 'commute with') are minor stylistic preferences on unpushed names that are already consistent with the shown mathlib precedents and accurately describe the lemmas; a maintainer would not insist on any of them, so acting on them yields no material improvement over the approved state.
